name: Stability AI (npx)
description: Generate, edit, upscale, and manipulate images with Stability AI models (Stable Diffusion) directly from your AI client via npx.

inputs.label: Stability AI API Key
inputs.description: Your Stability AI API key, used to authenticate requests to the Stability AI platform.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to the Stability AI platform at https://platform.stability.ai
2. Open Account > API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key and paste it here

inputs.label: Image Storage Directory
inputs.description: Directory where generated and edited images will be saved. Optional - defaults to a platform-specific location (e.g. ~/Desktop) when left blank.

auth.instructions: Create an API key from your Stability AI platform account at https://platform.stability.ai/account/keys
